original_image_tags: The reverse side of a light blue-gray document, likely cardstock. At the top, faint, reversed, typewritten text from the other side is visible through the paper, with the heading "Daily City Sightings Mental Works". A large, ornate, cursive watermark reading "SECOND Bond" is visible in the center of the page. The bottom right corner features an upside-down FBI stamp. The bottom left corner has some handwritten notes in pencil or light ink. There are two hole-punch holes at the top.
A standard, rectangular, blue ink stamp, oriented upside down on the page.

elements.description: Inverted blue stamped text at bottom right: 'MR. JONES / RECEIVED / FBI / S DEPT OF JUSTICE / MAY 25 3 09 PM 47'. A black ink handwritten signature or initials is present at the bottom left, along with some illegible markings. The reverse side of a typed document is visible through the paper, showing mirrored text including 'Daily Civil Aircraft Material Works' and other faded lines.

judge.reason: The two descriptions quote completely different text for the stamp at the bottom right ('MR. JONES / RECEIVED / FBI / S DEPT OF JUSTICE / MAY 25 3 09 PM 47' vs. a generic upside-down FBI stamp with no quoted text), indicating a direct contradiction on the specific visual content of the stamp.
